subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! This is not the day of silence and stillness. Arise from the horizon of utterance with the mention of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, and call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل لیس الیوم السکون و الصمت ان اطلع من افق البیان بذکر ربک الرحمن ثم ادع
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @personal instructions, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
